prompts.name: terminal-shell
prompts.prompt:
allowlister-remote approval required
  command: gh pr merge 42 --squash --delete-branch
  cwd: ~/src/allowlister-remote
Approve here or in the web app. [a]llow / [d]eny:

prompts.name: terminal-tool
prompts.prompt:
allowlister-remote approval required
  command: mcp__github__create_issue
  cwd: ~/src/allowlister-remote
Approve here or in the web app. [a]llow / [d]eny:

prompts.name: terminal-script
prompts.command:
set -euo pipefail
npm ci
npm run build
cargo test --workspace
git add -A
npm publish --access public
git push origin main --tags
echo "release complete"
